design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate levels using Volteccer (electricity-based movement and combat) to defeat Galaxy Gang and stop Doc Waruyama
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing speed-based mobility with combat encounters; electricity as both weapon and traversal tool creates dual-purpose risk/reward
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as a half-human, half-AI being with electrical powers; stop a corrupted father figure and cyber-terrorism threat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Thematic integration of electricity/Volteccer as core mechanic tied directly to protagonist's hybrid nature and origin story; cyberpunk narrative (21st century setting, C-Life AI, digitization) was innovative for mid-90s platformer genre

progression.unlock_mechanism: Progression through Galaxy Gang stages to confront Doc Waruyama
replayability_hooks: Challenge of defeating increasingly difficult gang members

world_building_techniques: Plot exposition: Doc Yoshiyama's digitization and transformation into Doc Waruyama establishes narrative stakes
Protagonist origin story: Pulseman's hybrid human-AI nature directly justifies core mechanic (Volteccer)
Thematic world: Galaxy Gang cyber-terrorism and EUREKA system create sci-fi setting for electronic-themed platforming
Character motivation: Personal conflict (stopping corrupted father) drives narrative through level progression

boss_design.philosophy: Galaxy Gang members serve as stage bosses; each represents a threat to be eliminated in player's mission to stop Doc Waruyama
notable_bosses: Doc Waruyama (final boss, corrupted father figure)

faction_indicators: Doc Waruyama's organization (unified threat under corrupted scientist)
danger_signals: Cyber-terrorism spread across world by Galaxy Gang
Doc Waruyama's corruption and twisted mind after digitization
EUREKA system enabling C-Life manifestation in human world
environmental_storytelling: Levels represent locations affected by Galaxy Gang operations
Pulseman's journey through stages shows escalating threat scope
